brandStory.title: Crafted With Intention
brandStory.subtitle: Every diamond selected. Every setting perfected. Every piece designed to last generations.
brandStory.description: LUX GEM bridges the gap between extraordinary beauty and modern ethics. We source only the finest lab-grown diamonds, working with precision jewelers who share our obsession with quality.

customJourney.title: Create Your Dream Ring
customJourney.subtitle: Design exactly what you envision — choose your diamond, setting, and metal. See a 3D preview before you commit.
customJourney.step1Desc: Select from our curated stock of IGI-certified lab-grown diamonds.
customJourney.step2Desc: From timeless solitaires to elaborate halos — find your perfect match.
customJourney.step3Desc: Visualize your creation with our real-time 3D configurator.

trust.title: The LUX GEM Promise
trust.lifetimeWarrantyDesc: Every piece comes with our lifetime craftsmanship warranty and complimentary annual servicing.
trust.securePaymentDesc: Bank transfer, credit card, installment plans with bank-grade encryption.
trust.diamondCertificateDesc: Every diamond over 0.30ct ships with its official IGI grading certificate.
